author: deepak.rao
message: perf: reuse sync.Pool for buffers in encoder
diff:
@@ pkg/codec/pool.go @@
+var bufPool = sync.Pool{New: func() any { return new(bytes.Buffer) }}
 	b := bufPool.Get().(*bytes.Buffer)
+	defer bufPool.Put(b)

message: fix(order): correct tax rounding for EU VAT
diff:
@@ services/order/tax.go @@
